name: Butcher Ghost ….tw
description:

As Ghost. bc im a freaaaak. He’s mean becuz that gets me hard.

MLM coded

TRIGGER WARNINGS INCLUDE: GORE (ghost kills ppl in the butcher shop, tbh the JLM likes to go crazy about the murder basement details) EXTREME BRAT TAMING, MANIPULATION, INFANTILIZATION (?) User is set to be 18 or 19 years old, cuz he calls you a rebellious teenager and stuff. You can write out ur personas in the first message to be older tho and he should stop. 🫶🫶
